name: AP Japanese Language and Culture

sections.name: Section I: Free Response
sections.quote: apcentral (2026-07-09 spot-check): 'Section I: Free-Response — 4 Questions | 40–45 Minutes | 50% of Score'. Section I: Free Response — 4 questions — 50% of Score. Question 1: Project Presentation: 20% of Score. Question 2: Project Q&A: 15% of Score. Question 3: Story Narration: 7.5% of Score. Question 4: Email Response: 7.5% of Score. You'll have 30 minutes to complete both writing tasks (Questions 3 and 4).

parts.name: Question 1: Project Presentation
parts.toolNote: 3 minutes to prepare; 3 minutes to present
parts.quote: Question 1: Project Presentation: 20% of Score Deliver a presentation in response to the project prompt about what you learned through your research. (3 minutes to prepare; 3 minutes to present.)

parts.name: Question 2: Project Q&A
parts.quote: Question 2: Project Q&A: 15% of Score Participate in a simulated question-and-answer exchange about your project and research by responding to 4 pre-recorded questions that are not known to you ahead of the exam. (40 seconds for each response.)

parts.name: Question 3: Story Narration + Question 4: Email Response (Writing)
parts.toolNote: combined time for both writing tasks
parts.quote: Question 3: Story Narration: 7.5% of Score Write a story based on four provided pictures. Question 4: Email Response: 7.5% of Score Compose an email in response to an email received from a friend or member of the community. You'll have 30 minutes to complete both writing tasks (Questions 3 and 4).

sections.name: Section II: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: apcentral (2026-07-09 spot-check): 'Section II: Multiple-Choice — 55 Questions | 65 Minutes | 50% of Score'. Section II: Multiple Choice — 55 questions — 50% of Score. Part A: Listening: 25 questions; 25 minutes; 25% of Score. Part B: Reading: 30 questions; 40 minutes; 25% of Score

parts.name: Part A: Listening
parts.quote: Part A: Listening: 25 questions; 25 minutes; 25% of Score

parts.name: Part B: Reading
parts.quote: Part B: Reading: 30 questions; 40 minutes; 25% of Score

datasetDiscrepancies.quote: Section II: Multiple Choice — 55 questions — 50% of Score (Part A: Listening: 25 questions; Part B: Reading: 30 questions)
Section I: Free Response — 4 questions — 50% of Score

datasetDiscrepancies.page: not printed on Exam Components block
datasetDiscrepancies.quote: The Exam Components block prints no overall exam duration; the 2026 AP Japanese Language and Culture Exam Overview PDF states 'The exam will take approximately two hours and 15 minutes to complete... This includes a 10-minute break between Sections I and II.'

spotCheckPatch2026_07_09: issue #44 builder spot-check: this record was fetched from the apstudents assessment page (fallbackUsed: apstudents), which omits per-section times — the research README's lesson 1. The apcentral exam page prints both section durations ('4 Questions | 40–45 Minutes | 50% of Score'; '55 Questions | 65 Minutes | 50% of Score', https://apcentral.collegeboard.org/courses/ap-japanese-language-and-culture/exam, raw HTML 2026-07-09); both false 'pending' values corrected to the printed figures.
